item.dc:creator: KanyesSideFish

item.title: Interesting Fact.
item.description: Lavinia Ellen "Vinnie" Ream Hoxie (September 25, 1847 – November 20, 1914) was an American sculptor. Her most famous work is the statue of U.S. President Abraham Lincoln in the U.S. Capitol rotunda.
item.dc:creator: Ice2Ice2

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Friday at the Star Wars Celebration in Anaheim.
item.description:
We did this one just for you, my Dudes!
With Dude Vader.
John Brummet did the Force Ghost before anyone else. I was glad to meet him. Outstanding guy.
With John Rhinehart, who plays a great Young Luke. Also a very, very nice guy. I'm lucky to know him.
Force ghost, Bistan, George (F)Lucas, me, Young Luke cosplay.
With the Frog Mom!!!
She had the tank and all! I did not get a pic of it. I has the dumb.
With Darth half-boy and Palps.
Heartburn time, old man!
From young Luke to dead Luke, in order.
With our boy, R2.
A Trooper I met while walking back from the store. He said "Hey, are you Fluke Skywalker? " Yep! Finally, I have people asking that vs. are you. Mark Hamill? That is a good thing for both Mark and me.
Not a cat tax but will a beef cake tax work? Tee hee. A fun shirt I brought to Anaheim. More pix from Disneyland tonight are heading your way, my Dudes. May the Force Be with you!
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker

item.title: Phone clearing dump
item.dc:creator: Akimaru

item.title: BU’s Prof. Jon Levy on masking up
item.description:
Felt like this deserved a posting
especially given how most people have stopped wearing masks,
which can be fine given the setting,
but absolutely should not make those who are still masked up with feel bad or guilty for doing so.
Because we aren’t.
Regardless of if we’re doing so for ourselves, our loved ones, or just because we want to. Stay safe people, and let others take whatever precautions they feel are necessary. Source: https://twitter.com/jonlevybu Edit: Most viral? I shall revel in the irony of that. :)
item.dc:creator: HomeRunWoman

item.title: Battle of the Joshes 2.0
item.description: They raised more than $20,000 for the Children’s Hospital in Nebraska. Way to go Joshes. https://www.usnews.com/news/us/articles/2022-05-22/pool-noodle-fight-over-the-name-josh-again-attracts-hundreds MV Edit: thanks for all the accolades! If you are in USA, please vote. Everyone else, please be kind to each other. Ps. feel free to send something interesting (movie recommendations, recipes, whatever makes you laugh).
item.dc:creator: AkademicEpidemik
